creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

This isn't due to the upstream withdrawal of distfiles.  The error in
the pr concerns the fenv sources downloaded from the FreeBSD SVN.
However, I can't reproduce the error indicated in this pr.  The files
downloaded from the FreeBSD SVN do match the checksum recorded in the
port.
That being said, recent FreeBSD releases don't require the fenv hack
anymore, after the change in msun being MFC'd to 8.  I'll update the
port in the next version.

- -- llwang
